---
title: "Vaccines"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
##############################################################################################################
# Loading data, then mutating date variables and calculating timediff between vaccine and infection. >>
# Vaccine names/brands should be levels, too. >>

vacunas_raw <- vroom("/opt/datos_compartidos/vacunas_data/total/ENC_VACUNAS_VACUNAS_TODO.txt") %>%
  mutate(NOM_VACUNA = gsub("COVID-19 ", "", NOM_VACUNA)) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  distinct()

# Creating vaccine vectors

covid_vaccines <- c("Abdala", "AstraZeneca", "CanSinoBIO", "CoronaVac (Sinovac Biotech)", "Covaxin", "Covishield", "HIPRA", "Janssen", "Moderna", "Novavax", "Pfizer/BioNTech", "Sinopharm", "Soberana", "Sputnik V")
eu_covid_vaccines <- c("AstraZeneca", "Janssen", "Moderna", "Novavax", "Pfizer/BioNTech")
noneu_covid_vaccines <- c("Abdala", "CanSinoBIO", "CoronaVac (Sinovac Biotech)", "Covaxin", "Covishield", "HIPRA", "Sinopharm", "Soberana", "Sputnik V")


vacunas_inprogress <- setDT(vacunas_raw) %>% 
  lazy_dt(immutable = TRUE) %>% 
  filter(NOM_VACUNA %in% covid_vaccines) %>% 
  mutate(NOM_VACUNA = as.factor(NOM_VACUNA), 
         FEC_VACUNACION = ymd(FEC_VACUNACION)) %>% 
    left_join(infect_covid5, by = "NUHSA_ENCRIPTADO") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(infect_covid_first_date)) %>% 
  mutate(
    vac_infecc_umbral = days(infect_covid_first_date - FEC_VACUNACION) / days(1),
    NOM_VACUNA = droplevels(NOM_VACUNA)
  ) %>% 
  as.data.frame()

# Filtering out vaccines received <14 days before infection. >>
# Last, getting number of vaccines per infection.
vacunas2 <- setDT(vacunas_inprogress) %>% 
  lazy_dt(immutable = TRUE) %>% 
  filter(vac_infecc_umbral >= 14) %>%
  as.data.frame()

vacunas3 <- setDT(vacunas2) %>% 
  lazy_dt(immutable = TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(NUHSA_ENCRIPTADO, orden_infeccion) %>%
  mutate(fec_ultima_vac = max(FEC_VACUNACION)) %>% 
  mutate(fec_ultima_inmun = max(fec_ultima_vac, unique(prev_infect_date), na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(
    ultima_vac_infecc_dias = infect_covid_first_date - fec_ultima_vac,
    ultima_inmun_infecc_dias = infect_covid_first_date - fec_ultima_inmun
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ultima_vac_infecc_meses_quant = days(ultima_vac_infecc_dias) / months(1),
    ultima_inmun_infecc_meses_quant = days(ultima_inmun_infecc_dias) / months(1),
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ultima_vac_infecc_meses_quant2 = trunc(ultima_vac_infecc_meses_quant),
    ultima_inmun_infecc_meses_quant2 = trunc(ultima_inmun_infecc_meses_quant),
  ) %>% 
  group_by(NUHSA_ENCRIPTADO, orden_infeccion) %>%
  summarise(
    n_vacunas_covid = n(),
    all_vaccines = paste(NOM_VACUNA, collapse = ", "),
    n_prev_infecc = unique(orden_infeccion) - 1,
    ultima_vac_infecc_meses_quant = unique(ultima_vac_infecc_meses_quant2),
    ultima_inmun_infecc_meses_quant = unique(ultima_inmun_infecc_meses_quant2)
  ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  separate(all_vaccines, into = paste0("shot_", 1:5), sep = ", ", extra = "drop", fill = "right") %>%
  mutate(n_exposi = n_vacunas_covid + n_prev_infecc) %>% 
  select(NUHSA_ENCRIPTADO, orden_infeccion, n_prev_infecc, n_vacunas_covid, shot_1:shot_3, ultima_vac_infecc_meses_quant, ultima_inmun_infecc_meses_quant, n_exposi) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Definir el operador `%notin%`
`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

# Defining vaccine categories
group_vaccines <- function(vaccines) {
  if (all(vaccines %in% "Pfizer/BioNTech", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Pfizer/BioNTech", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Pfizer/BioNTech")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Moderna", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Moderna", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Moderna")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "AstraZeneca", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "AstraZeneca", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only AstraZeneca")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Janssen", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Janssen", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Janssen")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Novavax", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Novavax", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Novavax")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% c("Pfizer/BioNTech", "Moderna"), na.rm = TRUE) & all(!vaccines %notin% c("Pfizer/BioNTech", "Moderna"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Mix of EU RNA vaccines")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% c("AstraZeneca", "Jannsen", "Novavax"), na.rm = TRUE) & all(!vaccines %notin% c("AstraZeneca", "Jannsen", "Novavax"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Mix of EU non-RNA vaccines")
  } else if (any(vaccines %in% c("Pfizer/BioNTech", "Moderna"), na.rm = TRUE) & any(vaccines %in% c("AstraZeneca", "Jannsen", "Novavax"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Mix of European RNA and non-RNA vaccines")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Abdala", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Abdala", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Abdala")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "CanSinoBIO", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "CanSinoBIO", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only CanSinoBIO")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "CoronaVac (Sinovac Biotech)", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "CoronaVac (Sinovac Biotech)", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only CoronaVac (Sinovac Biotech)")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Covaxin", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Covaxin", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Covaxin")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Covishield", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Covishield", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Covishield")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "HIPRA", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "HIPRA", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only HIPRA")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Sinopharm", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Sinopharm", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Sinopharm")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Soberana", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Soberana", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Soberana")
  } else if (all(vaccines %in% "Sputnik V", na.rm = TRUE) & all(vaccines %notin% "Sputnik V", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Only Sputnik V")
  } else if (any(vaccines %in% noneu_covid_vaccines, na.rm = TRUE) & any(vaccines %in% c("Pfizer/BioNTech", "Moderna"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Non-European Vaccines + European RNA vaccines")
  } else if (any(vaccines %in% noneu_covid_vaccines, na.rm = TRUE) & any(vaccines %in% c("AstraZeneca", "Jannsen", "Novavax"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Non-European Vaccines + European non-RNA Vaccines")
  } else {
    return("Other")
  }
}

# Defining function to categorize european and non-european vaccines
eu_and_noneu_vaccines <- function(vaccines) {
  if (any(vaccines %in% eu_covid_vaccines, na.rm = TRUE) &
      !any(vaccines %in% noneu_covid_vaccines, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("EU Vaccines")
  } else if (any(vaccines %in% noneu_covid_vaccines, na.rm = TRUE) &
             !any(vaccines %in% eu_covid_vaccines, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    return("Non-EU Vaccines")
  }
  else {
    return("EU and non-EU Vaccines")
  }
}

# Agregar las variables de grupo de vacunas y vacunas europeas a la tabla vacunas3
vacunas3 <- vacunas3 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(european_vaccines = eu_and_noneu_vaccines(c(shot_1, shot_2, shot_3))) %>%
  select(NUHSA_ENCRIPTADO:shot_3, european_vaccines, n_prev_infecc:n_exposi) %>%
  arrange(NUHSA_ENCRIPTADO)


```
